name: @yd/api
description: API to search and download YouTube videos in various formats.

scripts.format: uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.check: uv run mypy --ignore-missing-imports . && uv run ty check .
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.deps:update: uv sync --upgrade && uv run pre-commit autoupdate
